# vendor/localsend-core

Vendored copy of `core/` from the upstream LocalSend monorepo.

| Field        | Value                                                              |
|--------------|--------------------------------------------------------------------|
| Source       | https://github.com/localsend/localsend                             |
| Subdirectory | `core/`                                                            |
| Commit       | `90de693a9b1b04b48a8382a89e609bad433255bd`                         |
| Date         | 2026-03-03                                                         |
| Upstream license | Apache-2.0 — Copyright 2022-2024 Tien Do Nam               |

## License

The files under `localsend-core/` are distributed under the Apache License 2.0.
A copy of the license is included at `localsend-core/LICENSE`.

No files have been modified from their upstream originals.
All patches and extensions live in the `lsend-cli` crate itself.

## Updating

1. Identify the new commit in upstream `localsend/localsend` that you want to track.
2. Replace the contents of `localsend-core/` with the upstream `core/` directory at that commit.
3. Copy the upstream `LICENSE` file into `localsend-core/LICENSE`.
4. Update the **Commit** and **Date** fields in this file.
